label: Facebook — Social Feed & Group Browser
description: Extracted from: ScrapeClaw facebook-scraper, generic Playwright social scrapers. Verified 2026-07-16: main page times out (anti-bot). mbasic redirects to facebook.com with __mmr=1 param. body is null after redirect — strong anti-automation. Requires main mode with active session.
source_patterns: News Feed: infinite scroll, 3-8s pause per 3-4 posts (reading)
Photo: click → modal loads 1-2s → arrow next → hold 2-5s → close
Group: scroll slower, more text content (spend 4-10s per post)
Like/Reaction: hover on like button → 1-2s → pick reaction → click
Comment: click comment → 2s load → type → 2-4s → Enter
Share: click → 1-2s menu → click share method

active_hours.description: Broad — all ages, peaks at lunch and evening

scroll.description: Feed: slow browsing with content consumption pauses. Source: facebook-scraper patterns

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate feed → scroll slowly (4-6 passes, 3-8s pauses) → pause on post → click photo → wait modal → scroll → close → like → scroll more
